smee.label: smee.io
smee.desc: GitHub-hosted real-time event proxy. Streams webhook payloads to your browser via Server-Sent Events. No CORS issues.
smee.hint: Real-time via SSE. POST callbacks only.

ntfy.label: ntfy.sh
ntfy.desc: Open-source notification service repurposed as a webhook relay. Real-time SSE, no CORS issues. Large JSON bodies may be truncated.
ntfy.hint: SSE real-time. Large payloads may be truncated.

webhook.site.label: webhook.site
webhook.site.desc: Free, no signup. Auto-creates a unique endpoint and polls for incoming requests every 4 seconds.

postbin.label: postb.in
postbin.desc: Toptal-hosted request bin. Collects POSTs into a FIFO queue with 30-minute lifetime per bin.

denodeploy.label: Deno Deploy
denodeploy.desc: Self-hosted relay on Deno Deploy (free). Deploy the script to a Playground or via CLI. Real-time SSE with Deno KV persistence and 4-minute stream sessions.
denodeploy.hint: SSE real-time. Deploy deno-deploy-proxy-worker.ts to your Deno Deploy account.

valtown.label: Val.town
valtown.desc: Self-hosted relay on Val.town (free). Deploy the valtown-proxy-worker script and paste your Val URL here. Real-time SSE streaming with SQLite persistence.
valtown.hint: SSE real-time. Deploy valtown-proxy-worker.ts to your Val.town account.

custom.label: Custom URL
custom.desc: Point to any HTTP endpoint you control. No automatic polling or SSE - just injects the URL into the session JSON.
custom.hint: Enter your own webhook endpoint URL below.
